uplink.description: Measurement (ct=3): medium pressure P1, medium temperature TOB1, barometric reference PBaro, barometer temperature TBaro
uplink._note: Oracle method: synthetic in-bounds channels (P1=1.523 bar, TOB1=14.2 C, PBaro=0.9712 bar, TBaro=22.5 C) built as IEEE-754 MSB-first floats; expected = reference upstream-codec.js channel values converted to canonical units (bar x100 -> kPa, C as-is).

uplink.description: Measurement (ct=10): pressure P1, medium temperature TOB1, temperature-compensated conductivity
uplink._note: Oracle method: synthetic in-bounds channels (P1=2.05 bar, TOB1=11.7 C, Conductivity Tc=1.234 mS/cm) as IEEE-754 MSB-first floats; expected = reference channel values converted to canonical units (bar x100 -> kPa, mS/cm x1000 -> uS/cm).

uplink.description: Device information package (func=12): battery voltage, capacity %, enclosure humidity, identity
uplink._note: Input is the upstream TTN information-message example; expected = reference battery_voltage converted to canonical battery (V), other fields as camelCase extras, datetime as RFC3339.

uplink.description: Unsupported device type (ct) in a measurement package
uplink._note: ct=99 has no channel layout; codec rejects rather than guessing.
